programme.title: Just for Laughs Gags
programme.desc: "Stuffed Dog vs. Hot Dog"; "Buzzy Bee"; "Chicken Tartare."

programme.title: Just for Laughs Gags
programme.desc: "Super Juicier"; "Meat Expectations"; "Things That Totally Suck."

programme.title: Just for Laughs Gags
programme.desc: "Stuffed Dog Guards Bone"; "Golfball Jackpot"; "The Coffin Carried Off In."

programme.title: Just for Laughs Gags
programme.desc: "Magical Pranks"; "Lobster Launch"; "Really Fast Food."

programme.title: NEW! Shark PowerDetect with DuoClean Detect Technology
programme.desc: Meet the new Shark PowerDetect Upright Vacuum with features like DuoClean Detect Technology, self-cleaning brush roll and odor neutralizing and you will be cleaning faster, smarter and better!

programme.title: Rateescape: Stop Overpaying for Cellular
programme.desc: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

programme.title: 1776 - 2026 250th Anniversary Quarter Celebration Program
programme.desc: 2026 will be one of the most historic years ever in U.S. coinage; join your host Mike Mezack to learn about the incredible U.S. Quarter program and get a chance at an exclusive P&D Roll!

programme.title: Joint Relief Revolution
programme.desc: Join Connie Craig-Carroll and health visionary Ken Meares as they uncover OmegaXL, the groundbreaking natural supplement transforming lives by tackling joint pain and inflammation.

programme.title: Ready for a safer shower? Enjoy a one-day bath remodel with Jacuzzi.
programme.desc: Trusted brand Jacuzzi Bath Remodel and interior designer Christina Hall share their secrets on how you can easily and affordably transform your bathroom into a gorgeous custom, safe, stylish space in 1 day! Call for a FREE quote & installation.

programme.title: NECTAR TRI-PILLOW -Cooler, Comfy, Better Sleep! Buy One Get One FREE!
programme.desc: Discover the Nectar Tri-Comfort Cooling Pillow for the ultimate sleep experience! Adjustable to three firmness levels to provide customized support and cooling all night long. Order NOW to get a second pillow FREE, plus a 30-night home trial!

programme.title: World's Funniest Videos: Top 10 Countdown
programme.desc: Covers different themes in the search for the best and funniest videos from around the world; includes an entertaining look at relatable moments from real-life home movies.

programme.title: World's Funniest Videos: Top 10 Countdown
programme.desc: The top 10 times life got out of hand; a wedding groom's best man faints and smashes into an arch; a woman spins out of a go-kart, and more.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: Red convinces Kitty to leave Eric alone during his surprise birthday party; Eric's older sister arrives.

programme.title: That '70s Show
programme.desc: Kelso (Ashton Kutcher) persuades Eric (Topher Grace) to streak during President Ford's visit to town. With Laura Prepon, Danny Masterson and Wilmer Valderrama.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim invites his brother, Marty, who has separated from his wife and twin daughters to move into the Taylor household.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Randy surprises his family when he returns home for Christmas; Tim and Al compete in the neighborhood lighting contest.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim gives his newly divorced brother advice regarding twins and tantrums.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim and Al (Tim Allen, Richard Karn) go undercover to find the thieves of Brad's (Zachery Ty Bryan) new car.

programme.title: Bob Hearts Abishola
programme.desc: Abishola and Kemi's friendship is pushed to the edge when Kemi wants to disregard Nigerian tradition and have a Las Vegas wedding; Bob and the Wheelers have to avert a strike at MaxDot before it sinks the family business.

programme.title: Bob Hearts Abishola
programme.desc: Abishola and Kemi are conflicted as to how to handle Morenike after she confides her deepest secret to them; when Bob gets credit for Christina's idea for a Twitter marketing campaign, she considers leaving MaxDot.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: After learning that Dana earns more money than he does, Jim feels he needs to prove his worth to the children, so he buys them an expensive gift.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Cheryl chastises Jim for losing the receipt needed to return a defective DVD player -- until she realizes she lost it, not him.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mike plays cupid for Joe when he sets him up on a date with Cece; Kyle is jealous when Ryan invites Jen to be a guest on their podcast.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: When Mandy worries about Kyle passing his first college exam, she secretly enlists Vanessa, Jen and Ryan to help tutor him; Mike learns of Ed and Chuck's superstition involving their decision-making.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mike finds out that Ed is skipping Outdoor Man's annual bass festival in favor of Bonnie's fancy art gala; Mandy takes over festival planning for Kristin, and things don't go as planned.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mike and Chuck compete in Outdoorsman's annual chili cook-off; Ryan and Kyle take the place of Kristin and Mandy at Vanessa's weekly mother-daughter luncheon.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: Adam recruits Marcy to put Andi's snooty sister in her place when she comes for a visit.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: When Adam and Andi see how much Lowell's new relationship with Andi's sister is changing him, they stage an intervention to get him to stop putting up with her bad behavior.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim urges Andy to propose to Emily or risk losing her, but when he sees Emily dining with another man, he doubts the wisdom of his advice.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim's band wins a contest, providing the group an opportunity to play backup for child pop sensation Jami McFame.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Jim tries to earn money for Christmas gifts for his kids by landing the twins in a movie role opposite Steve Guttenberg.

programme.title: According to Jim
programme.desc: Andy and Jim plan a retreat at Andy's fiancée's cabin in the woods.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Tim asks former "Tool Time" girl Lisa to return to the show temporarily but neglects to consult with Heidi.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: The Taylors look forward to their annual summer getaway, each for different reasons. With Tim Allen and Patricia Richardson.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: When Randy writes an article for the school paper disclosing Binford Tools' poor environmental record, Tim feels flabbergasted.

programme.title: Home Improvement
programme.desc: Jill (Patricia Richardson) declines Tim's (Tim Allen) offer to build her a quiet at-home work space, and that offends him.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mike gets caught between Kristin and Ryan when it's discovered that Boyd was never vaccinated against chicken pox.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mindy worries about Kyle's safety after he gets in an accident; Ed makes an unexpected announcement; Eve plays with her high school football team.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: When Mike discovers Vanessa has given away the last of his incandescent light bulbs, he and Chuck go looking for more; Mandy announces she is getting her own apartment.

programme.title: Last Man Standing
programme.desc: Mike is inspired to follow his dream to open a fish and game restaurant; Eve and Mandy go pheasant hunting.

programme.title: That '70s Show
